## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] My skill follows the standard markdown format
- [ ] I have tested the skill works with at least one agent
- [ ] My code does not contain hardcoded paths or personal config
- [ ] I have added a brief description in the PR

## Testing

Describe how you tested this skill.

## Related Issues

Fixes # (issue)
